name: Frontend Design
description: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and making choices that don't read as templated defaults.
longDescription: Design-focused instructions for generating production-grade web UIs -- landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts -- that avoid the generic AI aesthetic. Encodes specific rules around typography pairing, spacing systems, color palette construction, visual hierarchy, and layout composition so generated code makes deliberate design choices rather than falling back to default Bootstrap/Tailwind patterns. Single `SKILL.md` reference with no additional scripts or dependencies.
